title: Execute basic queries
description: Given a database with tables, when I call execute() with where, pk, fields, or limit directives, it should return matching records with correct field projection and limits. Non-existent table raises an error (fail fast). Non-existent GSI name raises an error. Spec: features/query/execute_basic.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: starting execute basic queries story; plan to spec key-based reads + simple filters via execute API. Next: draft Gherkin + implement after schema/execute plumbing. Blockers: none.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: Python execute basic queries passing (pk/where/projection/limit/errors). Next: port execute to Rust. Blockers: none.
